rulings.Case Title: EUREKA GARDEN HOMEOWNER'S ASSOCIATION VS. DONALD WILLIAM DANMEIER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Relief From Late Service Of Expert Disclosure Demand
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 16, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANTS DONALD DANMEIER, DANMEIER ARCHITECTS, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORAION, MATTHEW KLUNIS Motion For Relief From Late Service Of Expert Disclosure Demand. GRANTED. MISTAKE REASONABLE. DISCRETIONARY RELIEF AVAILABLE UNDER CCP SECTION 473 AND ZELLERINO V. BROWN (1991) 235 CAL.APP.3D 1097. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: LUTHER WILLIAMS VS. CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 16, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. ON 4/28/08 DR. LAKOWSKY ISSUED A NOTE STATING THAT PLAINTIFF NEEDED A WORK CHAIR WITH A BACKREST. THE DOCTORS' NOTES ISSUED 5/08 AND 8/08 WERE ADDRESSING HIS SHOULDER INJURY. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RAISED WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS DISABLED. TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT RAISED WHETHER DEFENDANT REASONABLY ACCOMMODATED PLAINTIFF AND WHETHER DEFENDANT ENGAGED IN THE INTERACTIVE PROCESS IN GOOD FAITH GIVEN DEFENDANT'S DELAY OF APPROXIMATELY ONE YEAR TO RESPOND MEANINGFULLY TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT REGARDING THE LACK OF ERGONOMIC TRAINING/CHAIR WAS DIRECTLY RELATED TO THE CUSHION ISSUE AND WOULD HAVE BEEN UNCOVERED IN THE COURSE OF THE DISABILITY DISCRIMINATION INVESTIGATION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MARTIN F TRIANO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion On Attys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 16, 2011, line 6, DEFENDANT MARTIN TRIANO'S Motion On Attorneys Fees. GRANTED IN PART. PETITIONER IS AWARDED REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $22,241 FROM THE COURT PROCEEDINGS. MOTION DENIED AS TO THE ATTORNEY FEES FROM THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDING. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND BERRIOS VS. JOSE BERRIOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 16, 2011, line 8, DEFENDANT JOSE BERRIOS DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THAT THEY ARE BROUGHT WITHIN THE REQUISITE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE AN ACTIONABLE AGREEMENT THAT DOES NOT VIOLATE THE STATUTE OF FRAUDS AND DAMAGES CAUSED BY ITS BREACH. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT DEMONSTRATE A FIDUCIARY DUTY EXISTS AND BREACH. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOSE GUERRERO VS. WILEY C. VICKREY, ADMINISTRATIVE DIRECTOR OF THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 16, 2011, line 9, RESPONDENT WILLIAM VICKREY, THE JUDICIAL COUNCIL OF CALIFORNIA, THE ADMINSTRATIVE OFFICE OF THE COURTS AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE IN GOOD FAITH, A PROPER CLAIM UNDER CCP SECTION 1094.5 WHICH REQUIRES AN ADMINISTRATIVE DECISION MADE AS A RESULT OF A PROCEEDING IN WHICH A HEARING IS REQUIRED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BRENNAN NEWSOM VS. LARAMAR SF URBAN APARTMENTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Special Motion To Strike Complaint (Ccp 425.16)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 16, 2011, line 11, DEFENDANTS DAVID WASSERMAN, DANIEL STERN, WASSERMAN-STERN'S Special Motion To Strike Complaint (CCP 425.16). GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF CANNOT AVOID AN ANTI-SLAPP MOTION BY AMENDING THE COMPLAINT PRIOR TO THE HEARING ON THE MOTION. SEE SYLMAR AIR CONDITIONING V. PUEBLO CONTRACTING SERVICES, INC. (2004) 122 CAL.APP.4TH 1049, 1055. =(302/CWW)
